title: Personal Fit Score (cosine sim Genome × product attribute vector)
description: Implement the Personal Fit Score in lib/scoring/. Algorithm: cosine similarity between the user's Genome vector (P1.5) and the product's attribute vector derived from scraped data (P1.4) + True Value breakdown (P1.7). Output: { personalFit: number 0–100 }. Combined with True Value in SCORE_RESULT message returned to background SW. On-device inference only — no remote calls. TDD with fixture Genome vectors and product attribute matrices.
